_meta.title: Scion Player's Guide: Saints & Monsters
_meta.role: Supplement hooks — Saints (divine-adjacent paths), Titanic Scions, Denizens, and related chargen. Titanic Calling Knacks (Adversary, Destroyer, Monster, Primeval, Tyrant) are merged into knacks from knacksSaintsMonsters.json at bundle load.

titanicKnacksCallout: Titanic Calling Knacks from Chapter Four (pp. 91–97) appear in Knacks when your Calling is Adversary, Destroyer, Monster, Primeval, or Tyrant (sm_* ids). Titans Rising adds further Titanic and pantheon-flavored Knacks merged as tr_* (see data/knacksTitansRising.json).
saintsCallout: Saint chargen, Guides, Relics, and Marvel/Boon limits are PDF-first; extend data/boons.json or dedicated tables when you transcribe rules from the Saints chapters.
sorcererDataNote: Magic Purview and sample Magic Boons merge from purviewsDenizens.json / boonsSaintsMonsters.json at bundle load. Sorcerer wizard fields live in character.sorceryProfile (export JSON).
titanicDataNote: Epicenter summaries: bundle.epicenters (after load). Titanic extras: character.titanicProfile.
